'''ngadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabinonucleoside|arabinonucleoside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-dh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabinonucleoside|arabinonucleoside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngadhaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || ngædhækæth || ngædhækæj || ngædhækæsh || ngædhækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || ngadhadhakath || ngadhadhakaj || ngadhadhakash || ngadhadhaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || ngadhakath || ngadhakaj || ngadhakash || ngadhaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || ngadhafkafth || ngadhafkafj || ngadhafkafsh || ngadhafkaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ngadhakatha || ngadhakaja || ngadhakasha || ngadhakaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || ngadhakath || ngadhakaj || ngadhakash || ngadhaka
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ngadhakathal || ngadhakajal || ngadhakashal || ngadhakakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ngadhakaathatha || ngadhakaajaja || ngadhakaashasha || ngadhakaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || ngadhakathan || ngadhakajan || ngadhakashan || ngadhakakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ngadhakathaoro || ngadhakajaoro || ngadhakashaoro || ngadhakakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
